headline: CMS Energy (CMS) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
summary: CMS Energy (CMS) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: LS Power to construct new underground transmission line
summary: The project will connect two substations across seven miles to support electricity demand and grid reliability in the Bay Area on the US west coast.

headline: PG&E Approves Tesla Cybertruck For First-Of-Its-Kind Grid Program
summary: PG&E and Tesla partner on a V2X program, letting Cybertruck owners power their homes and sell electricity back to the California grid.

headline: Truist Securities Initiates Coverage On PG&E with Buy Rating, Announces Price Target of $23
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Richard Sunderland   initiates coverage on PG&E (NYSE:PCG) with a Buy rating and announces Price Target of $23.
